scripts.migration:generate: node -e "const {spawnSync}=require('node:child_process'); const args=process.argv.slice(1); const name=args.shift(); if(!name){console.error('Uso: npm run migration:generate -- <nome> [--dryrun] [--pretty] [--check]'); process.exit(1);} const cli='./node_modules/typeorm/cli-ts-node-esm.js'; const out=`src/migrations/${name}`; const r=spawnSync('node',[cli,'migration:generate','-d','./src/data-source.ts',out,...args],{stdio:'inherit'}); process.exit(r.status??1);"
